title: Disabling Auto-Escaping in Template Engines: Security Sensitive
description: To reduce the risk of cross-site scripting attacks, templating systems allow configuration of automatic variable escaping before rendering templates. However, auto-escaping is not a magic feature and depends on the strategy applied and the context. Enable auto-escaping by default and continue to review the use of inputs to ensure the chosen auto-escaping strategy is the right one.
recommendation: Enable auto-escaping by default and review the use of inputs.

checks.message: Disabling auto-escaping in template engines increases XSS risk - keep auto-escaping enabled
